debug_info.goal:
x : Surreal
y z : @Surreal.PartialSum x
h : y < z
⊢ @SurrealHahnSeries.toSurreal (@Surreal.PartialSum.carrier x y) ≠ x

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
intro hy
  have hyz : y ≤ z := le_of_lt h
  have hztr : z.truncIdx y.length = y := truncIdx_length_of_le (y := y) (z := z) hyz
  have htr : z.carrier.truncIdx y.length = y.carrier := by
    simpa [carrier_truncIdx] using congrArg carrier hztr
  have hi : y.length < z.length := by
    simpa [length_lt_length] using h
  have hcoeff := z.coeffIdx_eq_leadingCoeff_sub (i := y.length) hi
  have hzero : z.carrier.coeffIdx y.length = 0 := by
    simpa [htr, hy] using hcoeff
  exact (z.carrier.coeffIdx_ne_zero hi) hzero
